name: PLEOMORPHIC ADENOMA

demographics.Frequency: 80% of all benign parotid tumors; 3rd most common tumor in pediatric parotid

dominant_finding: hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense mass on T2WI
discriminating_features: lobulated round / oval sharply marginated mass
hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense mass on T2WI

general: lobulated round / oval sharply marginated mass
US: hypo- to isoechoic well-defined lobulated mass
less well-defined with low-density center if large (mucoid matrix, hemorrhage, necrosis)
often poor / absent / occasionally abundant vascularity
MR: hypointense on T1WI + hyperintense mass on T2WI

clinical.Cx: malignant transformation after decades (= carcinoma ex pleomorphic adenoma, typically
